name: Cursor
description: AI-powered VS Code fork. My primary daily driver for coding. Best Copilot++ experience available.

name: Claude by Anthropic
description: Best LLM for coding, planning, and architecture discussions. Sonnet 4 is the sweet spot.

name: Ollama
description: Run LLMs locally. I use qwen2.5:7b for offline AI assistance. Zero cost, full privacy.

name: n8n
description: Self-hosted workflow automation. Replaced Zapier for everything. 400+ integrations.

name: Git Bash (Windows Terminal)
description: Git Bash inside Windows Terminal — best shell setup for Windows devs who want Unix-ish tooling.

name: Figma
description: Design tool of choice. Coming from a design background, Figma is where I start every project.

name: Vercel
description: Deploy Next.js apps. Zero config, edge functions, preview deployments. Unbeatable DX.

name: Cloudflare
description: DNS, domain registration, and DDoS protection. Grey cloud mode with Vercel for full compatibility.

name: pnpm
description: Faster, disk-efficient npm alternative. Content-addressable store. Required for Vercel lockfile.
